app_id.comment_shipping: Set to the real Steam AppID once assigned in Steamworks. null = not yet registered.
app_id.comment_development: 480 = Spacewar (Valve's public test AppID). Never ship with this.

steam_cloud.byte_quota_note: 100 MB is more than enough for recipe JSON catalogs. Default partner quota is often 1 GB.

auto_cloud.note: Configure these exact rows in Steamworks App Admin → Steam Cloud → Auto-Cloud.

rules.note: Fallback when the game stages next to the install root (dev / portable).

actions: Enable Steam Cloud for this application

2_configure_auto_cloud.dashboard: Steamworks App Admin → Steam Cloud → Auto-Cloud
actions: Add each rule from auto_cloud.rules above
Verify Root / Subdirectory / Pattern match exactly
When AppID is assigned, set app_id.shipping in this file
Never ship steam_appid.txt with development AppID 480
